text.title: Technical Debt Trade-off Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) for the debt-record artefact. Validator enforces Fowler classification, observable trigger, and budget cap.

example.code: { "debt_id": "DEBT-0014", "title": "Inline auth check in /orders POST; not extracted to middleware", "intent": "deliberate", "prudence": "prudent", "severity": "localized", "code_area": ["api/orders.py"], "shortcut": "Auth check inlined in the handler to ship the Stripe webhook integration in time for the Q2 launch.", "better_solution": "Extract to FastAPI dependency injector; covers /orders + 6 future endpoints uniformly. ~3 days work.", "repayment_trigger": { "metric": "endpoints_requiring_same_auth_check", "operator": ">=", "threshold": 3, "source": "git grep + endpoint count in api/routers/" }, "budget_cost_pct": 0.6, "current_total_debt_pct": 14.2, "linked_adr": "ADR-0018" }

example.note: debt_id pattern fails; shortcut/better_solution too short; systemic severity touching 4 modules must escalate to ATAM (not debt); "someday" trigger violates observable-trigger-required; budget over cap.

list.item: severity == "systemic" recorded as debt instead of escalated to ATAM.
intent absent or prudence absent (single-axis classification).
